reviews.comment:
Es una bendición encontrarla , pues está en medio de la nada.
Te atienden bien , cuidan sus baños .

Es una lastima que no ofrecen comidas y es una pena muy lamentable que no tenga un servicio de hospedaje (sé que ypf no tiene xq ofrecer eso) .

Pero siempre en estos parajes hay algún hospedaje cercano...

Yo pasé con la familia veníamos de recorrer mucho se acercaba una tormenta y no había nada para pasar la noche por ahí.

(Repito YPF no tiene nada que ver con esto )
Solo cuento mi experiencia .

Saludos para todos los viajeros !!
De la familia viajera de Ezeiza !!

(Translated by Google)
It's a blessing to find it, as it's in the middle of nowhere.
They treat you well, and they take care of their bathrooms.

It's a shame they don't offer meals, and it's a very unfortunate shame that they don't have lodging services (I know YPF doesn't offer that because it's supposed to).

But there's always some lodging nearby in these parts...

I went there with my family; we'd been traveling a long way, a storm was approaching, and there was nowhere to spend the night.

(I repeat, YPF has nothing to do with this.)
I'm just sharing my experience.

Greetings to all travelers!!
From the traveling family of Ezeiza!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15838772092336886601/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNVMFpxZ0pBEAE
